title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 17–17, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #16 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE FOLLOWING MORNING - WANO COUNTRY: Kuri - OKobore Town

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: My apologies, O-lin. We're all out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It definitely wasn't enough, but you still gave me food, even though you're a poor person. Thank you, Tsuru!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: O-Shiruko is so sweet and yummy! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm glad that you liked it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are we really going? We're done for if her memories come back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We're worse off if we wait here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it, you adorable little chopperemon? (3)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said there are lots of O-Shiruko there?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 15 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
